flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lesley University fell 33% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 31% at Lesley University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.3k vs 1.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lesley University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.6k → $34.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lesley University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.6k → $34.3k).
